### Product Information

- Deep cleans your leather safely!

- Remove dirt, grime, human oils, etc.

- No softening or preserving additives

- Helps you clean and prep leather prior to leather coatings

- Product Code: GY-3309

- [Read full description](#product-description)

### Customer Reviews

100% of customers said that they would buy this item again

[Based upon 4 ratings](#product-reviews)

### Product Description

The Gyeon Leather Cleaner Strong will allow you to deep clean your leather so it looks and feels great. You can easily remove dirt, grime and oily residue with the unique formula that does not contain any softening or preserving additives. Leather Cleaner is safe on all modern types of leather and comes in two cleaning options, strong and mild. Strong works best on notably soiled leather surfaces, while mild is perfect for maintenance cleanings. For added cleaning power, Gyeon recommends using the [Gyeon Leather Brush](https://www.detailedimage.com/Gyeon-M91/Leather-Brush-P1847/) to work in the formula. This high-quality formula also helps prep your leather if you want to apply a leather coating like Gyeon Leather Coat afterward. Gyeon Leather Cleaner Strong is a great product that you'll enjoy using to make your leather look like new again.



**Cleaning Options:**



- [Leather Cleaner Strong](https://www.detailedimage.com/Gyeon-M91/Leather-Cleaner-P1515/500-ml-S1/) - Designed to clean heavily soiled leather areas.


- [Leather Cleaner Mild](https://www.detailedimage.com/Gyeon-M91/Leather-Cleaner-Mild-P1843/500-ml-S1/) - Best suited for lightly soild leather or as a maintenance cleaner.


### Professional Detailer Reviews

Gyeon Leather Cleaner was really a breeze to use. It made quick, easy work of this dirty seat. The product has a pleasant scent that is not too strong, and I barely used any product to clean this seat so the bottle will tackle many jobs. Gyeon claims that this product is safe to use on all modern leathers, and it is gentle enough to be used on top of a leather coating without harming or removing the coating. This cleaner does not contain any additives such as softeners or preservers, so it is an ideal option to use to prepare a surface prior to applying a leather coating.

[![image](https://www.detailedimage.com/Ask-a-Pro/wp-content/uploads/2018/03/38803221010_b0308e031e_b-1-300x147.jpg)](https://www.detailedimage.com/Ask-a-Pro/product-review-gyeon-leather-cleaner-2/)

- [Product Review: Gyeon Leather Cleaner](https://www.detailedimage.com/Ask-a-Pro/product-review-gyeon-leather-cleaner-2/) by [Zach McGovern](https://www.detailedimage.com/Ask-a-Pro/author/zach-mcgovern/)

### From The Label

#### Product Description

Strong and efficient pre-coating cleaner for all types of modern automotive leather upholstery. ** DO NOT USE ON NATURAL OR SEMI-ANILINE LEATHER.**

#### Directions

Vacuum upholstery before cleaning. For light contamination, spray on Q2M LeatherWipe Evo and wipe panel by panel. Otherwise, spray on a small area and clean with Q2M ScrubPad. Remove dirt in a straight motion. Wipe with a lightly damp cloth to remove excess of product.

** KEEP OUT OF REACH OF CHILDREN. **

### Customer Reviews

Reviewed by Kevin H. on 4/14/2025

[* DI Verified Purchase](https://www.detailedimage.com/FAQ/Ordering/What-does-DI-Verified-Purchase-mean-on-a-product-review/)

Would they buy this item again? **Yes**

Gyeon Leather Cleaner Strong is the perfect product for cleaning leather. Super easy to use and very effective. 10/10 would recommend!

Reviewed by Ben L. on 1/11/2019

[** DI Verified Purchase](https://www.detailedimage.com/FAQ/Ordering/What-does-DI-Verified-Purchase-mean-on-a-product-review/)

Would they buy this item again? **Yes**

The positive reviews of Gyeon Leather are SPOT ON! The red leather on my Maserati GranTurismo MC showed a significant amount of grime in the creases from past owners and is difficult to care for. I hit it with a brush and microfiber with this cleaner and the finished product was a amazing. Leather looked clean, soft, and supple. It just popped. I was amazed at the difference. I finished up with Gyeon coating to protect.

Reviewed by Antonio F. on 10/29/2018

[** DI Verified Purchase](https://www.detailedimage.com/FAQ/Ordering/What-does-DI-Verified-Purchase-mean-on-a-product-review/)

Would they buy this item again? **Yes**

Gyeon Leather Cleaner is, by a large margin, the best leather cleaner that I've ever used. Spray it on liberally, and agitate, then simply wipe away. 

We utilized this product on cashmere-colored leather to remove dye transfer from denim with ease. It also easily removes bodily oils, spills, and pretty much anything else that you might spill in your interior.

I highly recommend that anyone use this product with a Rupes iBrid Nano w/ the soft nylon cup brush. It foams up nicely and makes cleanup a breeze.

[Read all customer reviews of Gyeon Leather Cleaner Strong](https://www.detailedimage.com/Gyeon-M91/Leather-Cleaner-P1515/Reviews/)

[** Write your own review](https://www.detailedimage.com/Gyeon-M91/Leather-Cleaner-P1515/Reviews/#write)
